text: 1280 - وَ سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ لَهُ اَلضِّيَاعُ بَعْضُهَا قَرِيبٌ مِنْ بَعْضٍ فَيَخْرُجُ فَيَطُوفُ فِيهَا أَ يُتِمُّ أَوْ يُقَصِّرُ قَالَ «يُتِمُّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1280 - Abd al-Rahman bin al-Hajjaj asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who owns lands that are close to one another and he travels between them. Should he complete his prayers or shorten them?
Imam (as) replied: "He should complete [his prayers]."
